raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to Augstumu Pree-
ſteri ne uppureja us ta KU᷉ga
Altari Jerusaleme / bet tee ehde
neraudsetu Maisi starp Jaweeim
Brahteen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch Jagahnija arri-
dsan Towetu / kas to Innemia
to Altari/ kas Betelē bija/ar to
Behrnu Eeleijā irr/ ka ne weene
fawn Dehlu jeb fawn Meitu lik-
tu tam Molokam zaur Uggu-
ni eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch atmette arridsan
tohs Sirgus/ ko tee Kehnint no
Juhda tai Sanlei bijeezhlutcht/
kur ta KUNGA Nammā eets
tohp/ us ta Kambar-Junkura
Netan Meleka Kambari / kas
eekſch Parwarin dshwoja / un
fadedsinaja arridsan tahs San-
les Rattus ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch noplehſe arridsan
tohs Altarus/ kas us Akafa ang-
stas Istabas Jumta btja/ ko tee
Kehnini no Juhda bij darriſchi-
lihds ar teem Altareem/ ko Ma-
naffus eekſch ta KUNga Nain-
madiwejeem Pagalmeem bij dar-
rijs/ un fagruhde tohs/ un mette
winzu Vihſchlus us to Uppi
Rihdrann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Kehniſsch tagahni-
ja arridsan tohs Augstimus/ kas
preekſch Jerusalemes bija/pa lab-
bo Rohku ta Nomaitaschanas
Kalna/ ko Salamans tas Isra-
etā Kehniſsch bij ustajſijs Asta-
rotam to Zidoneru Elkam/ un
Kamofaim to Moabitern Elkam/
un Milkomam to Ammoniteru
Behrnu Elkam/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch fadausija arri-
dsan tahs uszeltas Bildeß/ un
iszirte arridsan tohs Elka Me-
schus/ un pildija winnu Weetas
ar Zilweku Rauleem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch noplehſe arridsan
to Altari/ kas Betelē bija/ar to
Augstumu/ ko Jerobeams Nee-
bata Dehls bij darrijs/ kas Isra-
elu grehkoht darrija / to paschu
Altari un Augstumu wiꞥſch no-
plehſe/ un fadedsinaja to Augstu-
mu/ un fagruhde to par Piſſch-
leemi / un fadedsinaja to Elka
Meschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad Josijus atgree-
sahs / tad redseja wiꞥſch tohs
Rappus/ kas tur Kalnā bija/tad
fuhtija wiꞥſch / un zehme tohs
Kaulus no Kapveem/ un fadedsi-
naja tohs us to Altari / un fa-
gahnija to pehz ta KUNGA
Wahrdu/ ko tas Deewa Wihrs
bij tsfauzis/ kas fchohs Wahr-
dus isfauze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weht fazzija wiꞥſch : Kah-
da Kappu-Weeta irr tchi/ ko es
redsu? un ta Piſſfahta Laudis
fazzija us to: Tas irr ta Dee-
wa Wihra Kaps/ kas no Juhda
nahze/ un schahs Leetas isfauze/
ko tu prett Beteles Altari darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija : Laı
wiꞥſch gull / ne kustinajeet ne
weens winna Kaulus. Ta tap-
pe winna Kauli glahbti ar ta
Praweeta Rauleem/ kas no Sa-
marjas bija nahzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Josijus noplehſe arridsan
wiꞥſus Augstumu Nammus/kas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
